description: Evidence artifact or observation linked from jobs, flows, and closeout.

artifact.description: Path, command output file, screenshot, transcript, result file, or external reference.

rules: Class B evidence cannot close a user-facing claim alone.
Dry-run and mock adapters default to Class B.
Quinn dev-CDP evidence defaults to Class B unless a packaged or founder-pristine path is declared.
Evidence must distinguish observed facts from inference.
